description: You are a physical geography professor preparing a lecture on continental vs. maritime climates. Using the brief at ~/Desktop/geography_lecture_brief.txt, NASA Panoply, and the NCEP surface air temperature climatology dataset, identify the region with the greatest annual temperature range (the strongest 'continentality'). Required deliverables include global temperature maps for January and July and an educational summary report identifying the region and its temperature swing. Save all deliverables to ~/Documents/Seasonality/.
